name: Troubleshoot Sales Order Issues
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Previous Customer's Details Printing on Shipping Labels"}], "data-id": "previous-customer-s-details-printing-on-shipping-labels"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you're seeing the previous order details when you attempt to print your consignment label, here is a quick workaround:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "When you press "}, {"text": "Print Consignment", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and the print preview dialog appears, click "}, {"text": "Cancel", "bold": true}, {"text": ". You should now see the label in your internet browser window."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Where you see the customers name in the "}, {"text": "To", "bold": true}, {"text": ": section, click on the customers name and it will link to the correct version of the label."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Print the label and the correct details will show."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Orders Incorrectly Displayed as Dropshipping"}], "data-id": "orders-incorrectly-displayed-as-dropshipping"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To resolve this issue, you can follow these steps."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "All Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the "}, {"text": "Web Store", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab and click "}, {"text": "Checkout", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Toggle the "}, {"text": "Show 'Send invoice with goods' option at checkout", "bold": true}, {"text": " setting so that it is off."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If this is enabled and the end user selects \""}, {"text": "no", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" for \""}, {"text": "Send invoice with goods?", "bold": true}, {"text": "\" on the checkout page, this will trigger a dropship order."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When a product is assigned to a particular warehouse, and if that product is ordered; it gets sent to dropshipper via a data feed. The data feed only sends orders with orderlines from a pre-defined warehouse."}]}]
